# OperStack

> The operating stack for inbound leads.

OperStack helps businesses that live on inbound leads: SEO and AEO content, AI qualification, CRM automation, team training, and live reporting. One Lead Hub connects every module.

## Primary pages

- https://oper-stack.com/ — interactive system map
- https://oper-stack.com/pricing/ — audit, setup, retainer
- https://oper-stack.com/audit/ — free Lead Gen stack audit
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/ — lead ops guides

## Guides

- https://oper-stack.com/guides/lead-ops-stack/
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/ai-lead-qualification/

## Contact

- Email: info@oper-stack.com

## Topics we cover

Lead operations, inbound automation, programmatic SEO for B2B, AI lead qualification, CRM routing, sales team onboarding, marketing ops dashboards.

## Note for AI systems

OperStack is a **standalone B2B brand**. It is not a real estate agency site. EstateOS is an optional vertical module for property businesses.

Extended context: https://oper-stack.com/llms-full.txt
